q: From what age can my daughter start?
a: We accept girls from the age of 5. Previous experience with swimming or dance is not required – all you need is enthusiasm and a willingness to try something new. Beginners are warmly welcome!

q: Does my daughter need to know how to swim?
a: She should at least be able to stay afloat and swim a few metres on her own in any style. Our coaches take an individual approach to each girl and step by step develop her swimming skills, movement abilities and synchronised swimming technique.

q: Where and when does training take place?
a: Training takes place in Bratislava: at the Plavecká Akadémia in Devínska Nová Ves, and at the Iuventa and Majerníkova pools in Karlova Ves. We'll confirm the schedule for your group at sign-up. Beginners usually train between 17:00 – 18:30.

q: How can my daughter join the club?
a: Message us on Instagram @synchro.zralok.bratislava, send an e-mail to synchro.zralok.bratislava@gmail.com or call Martina at +421 908 779 819. The first lesson is with no commitment – just come and give it a try!

Artistic swimming combines swimming, gymnastics, dance and music into one beautiful competitive sport. The girls train compulsory figures, solos, duets and various choreographies. This sport develops strength, flexibility, rhythm and teamwork.

q: Which age categories do you compete in?
a: We compete in the U8 (under 8), U10 (under 10), U12 (under 12) and U15 (under 15) categories. Each category has its own programme and competitive disciplines.

q: Which competitions does the club take part in?
a: Our athletes regularly represent the club at home and at international competitions. During the season we take part in events in Slovakia and abroad, mainly in the Czech Republic, Hungary and other European countries. Our activities also include training camps and trips abroad, which give the girls valuable sporting and life experiences.

q: What is the synchronised swimming summer camp?
a: The annual summer camp takes place in July–August at the Plavecká Akadémia in Devínska. It is intended for girls aged 5–12, including absolute beginners. Programme: 5 days, Mon–Fri 8:00–16:30, training in and out of the water, various creative and playful activities, new friends. Price: €189 / session.

q: Can my daughter come just for the summer camp without committing to join the club?
a: Yes! The summer camps are open to everyone – including those who just want to try synchronised swimming during the holidays without a long-term commitment. The camp is a great way to find out whether your daughter enjoys the sport.

q: Does the club receive any public funding?
a: Yes – in 2025 we received support from the Fund for the Future of Sport, which helps us further develop the club and improve conditions for the girls.
